# airtelcloud_public_ip_policy_rule (Resource)

Manages a policy rule on an Airtel Cloud Public IP (NAT Gateway). Policy rules control traffic allowed or denied through the public IP.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `action` (String) The action to take: `accept` or `deny`.
- `availability_zone` (String) The availability zone (e.g., `S1`, `S2`).
- `display_name` (String) The display name of the policy rule.
- `public_ip` (String) The public IP address (from the parent public IP resource).
- `public_ip_id` (String) The UUID of the parent public IP resource.
- `services` (List of String) List of service names to allow/deny (e.g., `HTTP`, `HTTPS`, `SSH`). Available services can be queried from the IPAM service API.
- `source` (String) The source IP address or `any` for all sources.
- `target_vip` (String) The target private IP (from the parent public IP resource).

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The unique identifier (UUID) of the policy rule.
- `state` (String) The current state of the policy rule.
